name: Chocolate Chip Meringue Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugars until light and fluffy.
2. Add egg yolks and vanilla, mixing until combined.
3. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, stirring until well blended.
5. Spread the batter evenly into a greased and floured 9x12-inch pan.
6. Sprinkle chocolate chips over the batter and gently press down.
7. Whip egg whites in a clean bowl until stiff peaks form.
8. Gradually add the brown sugar to the whipped egg whites, beating until stiff and glossy.
9. Spread the meringue mixture on top of the chocolate chip layer.
10. Sprinkle chopped nuts evenly over the meringue.
11. Bake at 325°F for 25 minutes, or until set and lightly golden.
